title: Better Clear Glass   [ Borderless ]
description: [ 1.7 - 1.19 ] A real and very clear glass !
body:
**This resource pack add a new clear and borderless texture glass useful for fog effect !**
=====================
(normal glass x64 texture have a very clear texture and connected texture compatibility with CTM optifine, for 1.16.2+ with CTM mod or Continuity
-----------------------------


This resourcepack change texture of glass for adding more immersion on building and for make a fog effect with multi-layer of glass ( normnal glass have a 32x texture and connected texture compatibility with a lot of mod for forge, fabric or quilt mod loader ) and change panels model for more immersion 
-----------------------------

### - OptiFine ([OptiFine](http://optifine.net "OptiFine"))

### - CTM mod ([CTM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm "CTM"))

### - CTM mod fabric ([CTM Fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm-fabric "CTM Fabric"))

### - CTM Refabricated mod ([CTM Refabricated](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm-refabricated "CTM Refabricated "))

### - Continuity mod fabric ([Continuity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/continuity "Continuity"))

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ia2umfZR/images/c8348d4d010e26cf1fc91e72868f177bd8fdae7e.png "")
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ia2umfZR/images/a8ad55c480b4ad80e8f2bd27790f61b965372f0f.png "")
***Added a custom model for glass panes for fix rendering from panel layer***
